title: Payload Design Review — 2024-08-02

# Payload Design Review — 2024-08-02

**Attendees:** Tyler Moss, Nina Schulz, Priya Nair, Jordan Kim

## Summary

This page covers the thermal management approach for the Payload subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.
